prompt: A premium building fascia sign on a modern charcoal rendered building facade at dusk golden hour. The sign features brushed stainless steel letters forming geometric L and K letterforms made from precise straight lines, sharing a single vertical stroke where they connect, creating a clean architectural monogram. The geometric letters have sharp 90-degree and 45-degree angles, modern and minimal. A single thin gold accent line runs through the design. Below, brushed metal letters read LK DESIGN AND BUILD in widely-spaced thin sans-serif. Beneath that, smaller text reads 0401 061 246 and lkdesignandbuild.com.au. The letters are mounted with standoff pins creating subtle LED backlighting against the dark facade. Golden hour light catches the metal surfaces. Modern commercial building exterior, architectural photography.
negative_prompt: cheap signage, vinyl banner, pixelated, low quality, daytime flat lighting, ugly building, run-down, dirty, cluttered, cartoon, illustration, ornate, decorative

settings.lighting: golden hour dusk with LED backlighting
settings.camera_angle: slight low angle looking up at signage
